scopeSync.summary: Scoped active work to 영역 01 viewport and desktop backdrop implementation files plus deterministic config/CSS contract tests.

targetedTest.summary: 5 tests passed, including viewport maximumScale/viewportFit/userScalable contract and global CSS safeguards for touch/input zoom/layout/backdrop.

lint.summary: ESLint passed for the viewport shell UI changes.

typecheck.summary: TypeScript passed after typing the Next.js viewport export as Viewport.

baseline.summary: Harness validation, lint, typecheck, and full Vitest suite passed: 19 test files passed, 1 skipped; 228 tests passed, 15 skipped.

build.summary: Production build passed after providing build-time public Supabase env; direct default build is blocked by local APP_PROFILE requiring a local Supabase URL.

browserRuntime.provider: npm run dev, in-app browser, server terminal log
browserRuntime.command: npm run dev; in-app browser opened http://localhost:3000/
browserRuntime.summary: Dev server reported Ready on localhost:3000. Browser loaded title FC moim with .app-viewport and .phone-shell present, app viewport display flex/overflow hidden, phone shell touch-action pan-y, CSS variables --bottom-nav-height 72px and --header-height 56px, and 0 console error logs.

retrospective.issuesObserved: Default npm run build is environment-blocked when APP_PROFILE=local lacks a local Supabase URL; Turbopack also needed unsandboxed execution after the env issue was resolved.
retrospective.missedEvidence: Mobile real-device pinch and iOS Safari keyboard zoom checks were not run in this turn.
retrospective.harnessImprovementProposal: Consider adding a documented build verification script that injects safe public build-time env for PRD build checks.
retrospective.reason: The viewport/backdrop behavior is area-specific PRD work; no new durable harness policy is needed beyond existing CSS variable and evidence rules.
